narratives.full_description:
A pilot project in schools where students aged 10-16 pitched ideas, learned new skills, and built projects for a public exhibition

A pilot project in schools across Yerevan and Charentsavan. Students (ages 10–16) pitched their own ideas via an Open Call. They learned new skills from industry professionals. They built their own projects from scratch. The finale was a real public exhibition where they presented their work to a jury.
narratives.curatorial_concept:
We come to a school that is interested in project-based education  – an approach where school knowledge is applied to real-life creative and research projects. As part of the exhibition, students create projects that draw on their subjects, research and creative process. 
 
 Integration of project-based education  into the school process: application of knowledge from school subjects in real projects. 
 Formation of an interdisciplinary approach: combination of science, art, media, technology in unified creative research. 
 Identification and support of talented students, their involvement in the hosq  ecosystem 
 Creation of a platform for interaction between the school and representatives of the creative industry.

• Involve students in project learning  through art and science. 
 • Identify talented students  and give them a resource for further development. 
 • Introduce the Open Call within the school system, where students independently propose project ideas. 
 • Organize a series of master classes from industry representatives to expand their ideas about the possibilities of creative professions. 
 • Identify Four projects for grant issuance  for further training.
narratives.team_competence_narrative:
- Read and understand the instruction = 20 euros 
 - Online curators meetings (Q&A) - 3 meetings = 30 euros 
 - Collection in separate school: 2 = 30 euros 
 - Collections with children: 10-12 = 180 euros 
 - Lead students' projects, check updates. Table of statuses: 
 - Chat with children = 100 euros 
 - Workshop visits - 4-5 = 60 
 - Rehearsal of presentations with children - 2 days = 100 
 - Installation of exhibitions - 1 day = 50 
 - Exhibition - 1 day = 50 
 
 Team: 
 - Curators from schools 
 - Manager from hosq : 
 - Workshop speakers: 
 
 Our tasks: 
 - Presentation - open call 
 - Video presentation 
 - Instruction for curators
narratives.outcomes_list:
- **Outstanding talents** get access to residences, laboratories and educational opportunities ** hosq **. 
 - **The school integrates project training** into its system. 
 - **A base of prospective students** is being created, with whom it is possible to work further. 
 - **A community of curators** is formed from the number of teachers, which can be expanded in other schools.
